input.initialPrompt: Build this project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binlog for each build.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.command: cd /tmp/sv-7769a3a63a4f4d2f9929ec682ebb8465 && dotnet build -c Debug /bl:debug.binlog 2>&1 && echo "---DEBUG BUILD DONE---" && dotnet build -c Release /bl:release.binlog 2>&1 && echo "---RELEASE BUILD DONE---"
